## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)

## Merge Strategy

> ⚠️ **Important:** This repository uses commit messages to determine the version bump during publish.
> Please use **"Rebase and merge"** or **"Create a merge commit"** when merging this PR.
> **Do NOT use "Squash and merge"** — it discards individual commit messages.
